title: mononeuria minima
intro: Mononeuria minima, also known as Sida rhombifolia, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is also believed to have health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Mononeuria minima include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments.
